prompt: Create a high-fashion runway portrait of a young East Asian woman with fair skin, delicate features, and long voluminous wavy black hair walking toward the camera with a calm confident expression and direct eye contact. Frame her from mid-thigh to just above the head in a vertical 9:16 composition, centered slightly left, with shallow depth of field and a dark blurred runway audience in the background. She wears a black deep-V spaghetti-strap couture bodice covered in ornate silver floral embroidery and beadwork, paired with black trousers or skirt panels, a wide black leather waist belt with a round metal buckle, and cutout detailing at the waist. Include exactly 4 visible jewelry elements: two dangling crystal earrings, one black choker with small hanging beads, and one small strap brooch or jewel near the left shoulder. She carries or holds one black feathery garment or stole at her right side. Lighting should be dramatic runway lighting with soft highlights on the face and collarbones, muted charcoal background, realistic skin texture, glossy lips, subtle smoky eye makeup, cinematic editorial fashion photography, ultra-detailed fabric embroidery, natural motion in the hair as if from a runway breeze. Use black, silver, charcoal gray, and soft skin tones. No text, no logo, no watermark.
